www.google.com
item.description: <p>This is a link post without a title. The title should be the link with or without protocol. Clicking on the link should open <span class="exturl" data-url="aHR0cDovL3d3dy5nb29nbGUuY29tLw==">Google</span> in a new tab or window.</p>
